cases.description: Basic extraction of 3 characters starting at position 2
start_num beyond the string length returns an empty string, not an error
cases.expected_note: Microsoft docs: "If start_num is greater than the length of text, MID returns \"\" (empty text)." Source: https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/office/mid-midb-functions-d5f9e25c-d7d6-472e-b568-4ecb12433028

cases.description: num_chars larger than the number of characters remaining returns just what's left, not an error or padded result
start_num=1 with num_chars covering the whole string returns the whole string
